# Accessor: maxGlyphDimensions

## Get Signature

```ts
get maxGlyphDimensions(): object;
```

Effective tile dimensions used by the layer grid.

### Returns

`object`

| Name | Type |
| ------ | ------ |
| `height` | `number` |
| `width` | `number` |

### Example
